Roxanne and Coco's relationship sours when Roxanne blames Coco for the company's predicament. Outside of work, Azree faces turmoil back home and is forced to move out.

programme.title: Setulus Hati - EP 1
programme.desc: Setulus Hati tells the story of a pilot and flight attendant, Alvino and Rossa. Their marriage looks perfect and harmonious. But apparently, the presence of Lia, who is Rossa's best friend, actually becomes a thorn in Rossa and Alvino's marriage.

programme.title: From KL to PL - EP 3
programme.desc: 4 personalities from 4 different backgrounds embark on a journey in the United Kingdom on a mission to explore the Premier League's leading stadiums. A vacation that is supposed to be fun but there are tasks that need to be completed.

programme.title: Durrani - Perjuangan Lion Mum - EP 7
programme.desc: Estranged daughter Jasmine turns to lawyer Durrani to claim her rightful inheritance but face hurdles because her parents' marriage wasn't registered in Singapore. As the inheritance dispute becomes public, tensions rise, testing Durrani's boundaries between professional responsibility and personal involvement. Reza struggles emotionally and professionally after his mentor’s tragic death.

programme.title: Papa Ricky - EP 54
programme.desc: After Alisya pleads with her, Kathy slowly begins to forgive Riqmal. Elsewhere, Zara finally uncovers the painful truth about her past and her father.

programme.title: Ultraman Omega - EP 18
programme.desc: There are many universes, they may be similar, but they have their own characteristics, as in the case of Omegaverse. A universe that's similar to the original Ultra universe, but has its own ultras. Omega is a Space Garrison rookie who was sent to Earth on a mission to protect it from monsters that appear mysteriously.

programme.title: Aroma Puncak Borneo S1 - EP 12
programme.desc: The journey of a nomad to the peaks of the highlands in Borneo. Exploring gastronomy and cuisine while getting to know the customs and cultures of various ethnic groups on the Land of the Hornbills.

programme.title: Bunga Salju - EP 39
programme.desc: Adam manages to contact Qaisara while being in captivity, triggering a rescue that ends with Azizi’s release and Ekin’s arrest. As Tan Sri Iskandar tightens his protection over the family, Farouk goes into hiding and Karmilla presses on with her plan against Tan Sri Iskandar.

programme.title: BRU - EP 1
programme.desc: The story of Shah, a big-hearted mover who has big dreams of owning his own coffee business from his father's old van. But that dream, as we know in the real world, is not as easy as ABC. Shah has to deal with capital problems, competitive pressure, elite customer frustrations, and technical challenges that sometimes make his head almost explode

programme.title: Stepmom
programme.desc: Isabel, a fashion photographer, struggles to endear herself to her divorcee boyfriend's children and his ex-wife Jackie. However, a diagnosis of terminal cancer sparks a change in their relationship.

programme.title: Angels & Demons
programme.desc: When Robert Langdon, a symbologist, learns about the revival of a secret organisation aiming to destroy the Vatican, he immediately joins forces with a scientist to stop the attack.

programme.title: Inferno
programme.desc: After waking up with amnesia in a hospital, Robert Langdon teams up with Sienna Brooks, one of his doctors, to protect the world from the evil plan of a scientist.

programme.title: Poseidon
programme.desc: On New Year's Eve, the luxury ocean liner Poseidon capsizes after being swamped by a rogue wave. Later, the survivors are left to fight for their lives as they attempt to escape the sinking ship.

programme.title: Forrest Gump
programme.desc: Forrest, a man with low IQ, recounts the early years of his life when he found himself in the middle of key historical events. All he wants now is to be reunited with his childhood sweetheart, Jenny.

programme.title: Julie & Julia
programme.desc: Julie Powell, a young blogger, is determined to emulate Julia Child's cooking techniques. Though separated by time, the two women share a common passion for food that intertwines their lives.

programme.title: The Big Short
programme.desc: A few shrewd but oddball fund managers and traders bet against the US mortgage system's stability.

programme.title: Big Eyes
programme.desc: The husband of Margaret Keane, a phenomenal painter, wrongfully claims credit for her works and enjoys her success until a legal battle between the two reveals the truth to the world.

programme.title: Dia Yang Kau Pilih
programme.desc: Kinara, a kind-hearted girl who is the backbone of her family. Maura, Kinara's younger sister, never wants to help and has ambitions to marry a rich man so she can live a luxurious life. Kinara gets a job at Dafa's company. Working together often causes Dafa and Kirana to fall in love. Knowing this, Maura wants to steal Dafa away.

programme.title: Aku Sudah Tak Ayam Lagi
programme.desc: Mita (Yuriska Patricia) is sworn to fall into poverty by Genta (Fendy Chow), a dim sum seller, soon after Mita gets the news that her father has died and leaves behind a lot of debt. Mita falls into poverty and has to go to the village to meet her grandfather to learn how to manage her father's inheritance, namely a chicken farm.

programme.title: Raja Mozarella Emang Bikin Melting
programme.desc: The life of a nerdy couple in high school. Mario and his girlfriend Nana were each other's first loves. One day, Mario changed his appearance as he grew up and became a very handsome, cool guy. Mario then met his high school sweetheart again, who he thought was still very nerdy and adorable.

programme.title: Love Story The Series S3
programme.desc: Kendra's meeting with Maudy began with an accidental meeting at the Villa, that's where Ken first saw Maudy and immediately fell in love. Initially, Maudy was disturbed by Ken's presence, accidentally the horse that Maudy was riding went berserk until it fell into the river, not long after Ken jumped to save Maudy.

programme.title: Dia Yang Kau Pilih

programme.title: Robinhoodwati Damagenya Gak Ada Obat
programme.desc: Mae, a talented pickpocket, and Saka, who is facing unemployment, form an unexpected alliance to help street children. When Mae disguises herself as Maysa, a love story and unexpected changes unfold.

programme.title: Dilihat-lihat Cinta Ini Yang Paling Jauh
programme.desc: He got a job as Vania's bodyguard, but Cakra ended up guarding Vania's heart as well. What started as a fight over bread turned into a fight over love.

programme.title: Love Story The Series S3
programme.desc: Kendra's meeting with Maudy began with an accidental meeting at the Villa, that's where Ken first saw Maudy and immediately fell in love. Initially, Maudy was disturbed by Ken's presence, accidentally the horse that Maudy was riding went berserk until it fell into the river, not long after Ken jumped to save Maudy.

programme.title: Kenalin Mas Serabutan Pengendali Hati
programme.desc: Cinta worked odd jobs, becoming a traveling dangdut singer and doing various other jobs. In order to keep her friendship intact, Cinta paid her neighbor, Andre, a handyman, to pretend to be her boyfriend, so that her friend wouldn't get angry and their friendship could be restored.

programme.title: Cinta Setelah Cinta S1
programme.desc: Love After Love tells the story of a family that appears perfect but hides a heartbreaking secret. Feeling lucky to have a husband like Niko, a successful businessman, and a daughter, Audrey, Starla must now swallow the bitterness of Niko's affair with their mutual school friend, Ayu.

programme.title: Pencarian Cinta Ande-Ande Lumut
programme.desc: Sekar goes into hiding after becoming caught up in a family conflict due to allegations of corruption against her father. While rescuing a wealthy photographer named Andre, Sekar loses her necklace. Hiding at Bu Narsih's house, she faces disapproval from her children. Meanwhile, Andre searches for her, bringing unexpected conflict.
